title: German Braised Sausage Stew
description: A hearty German stew made with thick German sausage and cola-glazed potatoes, all slow-cooked to perfection. Serve with a side of crusty bread for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove the sausage from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, carrots, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cola, stew, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the sausage to the pot and bring the stew to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Add the potatoes to the pot and continue to simmer, covered, until the potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Glaze the potatoes with the cola and serve.
